The '''Moraj Memorial''' was a memorial near the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Bestine (city)/Legends|Bestine]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="SWG" />

==History==
It was erected by the first settlers and founders of the Bestine Township—"in memory of brave [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Moraj]]".<ref name="SWG" />

==Behind the scenes==
This memorial was placed by the developers in the [[Wikipedia:MMORPG|MMORPG]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' to honor [[Nathan Larkins|Nathan "Moraj_Markinnison" Larkins]], one of the first beta testers, who had died shortly after the beta test launched due to a car crash. It was placed in the exact location where the first beta testers entered the game.

It is commonly called "''Moraj Memorial''" by players and fansites, although the in-game description of the memorial flag just calls it "''A historical marker''".

The developers also added a special guild hall with a Tatooine Skin that could be placed on any planet.

It was noted in the ''Guinness Book of Video Game Records'' to be the first MMORPG to have a virtual memorial for a deceased, real life individual. The [[The Freeman Memorial|Freeman Memorial]] became yet another in-game memorial for a deceased individual in November of [[2008]].
